chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-612 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) For hearing of M.A. No.1665/2024. 06.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == The counsel for the petitioner is present, who is praying for restoration of this petition which was dismissed for non-prosecution on 30.01.2024; however, today learned counsel for petitioner contends that since matter in hand pertains to land acquisition against Government Department as such valuable rights are involved therein. In such circumstances, application is allowed and the matter is restored to its original position. Adjourned. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
